where.if: AND ( LOWER(recipient_email) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(recipient_name, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(subject) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(provider_message_id, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND created_at < CAST(#{toDate} AS date) + INTERVAL '1 day'

mapper.select:
SELECT email_log_seq ,recipient_email ,recipient_name ,subject ,provider ,provider_message_id ,status ,error_message ,retry_count ,sent_at ,opened_at ,created_at FROM event.email_logs
ORDER BY created_at DESC, email_log_seq DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT email_log_seq ,template_seq ,recipient_email ,recipient_name ,subject ,body_html ,provider ,provider_message_id ,status ,error_message ,retry_count ,sent_at ,opened_at ,created_at FROM event.email_logs WHERE email_log_seq = #{emailLogSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE event.email_logs SET status = 'sent' ,provider_message_id = #{providerMessageId} ,error_message = NULL ,sent_at = NOW() WHERE email_log_seq = #{emailLogSeq}
